_metadata.name: Equipment Database (Commerce)
_metadata.description: Equipment with cost/rarity data for trading UI. Weapons section matches Core Rules. CAUTION: armor, gear, and attachments sections are placeholder/fabricated data from early development — NOT from Core Rules. Canonical game data lives in: armor.json, consumables.json, utility_devices.json, onboard_items.json, implants.json, weapon_modifications.json.

weapons.name: Hand Gun
weapons.description: Standard sidearm. Grants +1 to Brawling rolls.

weapons.name: Hand Cannon
weapons.description: Heavy pistol with devastating stopping power.

weapons.name: Colony Rifle
weapons.description: Basic frontier rifle.

weapons.name: Military Rifle
weapons.description: Standard military-issue rifle.

weapons.name: Auto Rifle
weapons.description: Automatic rifle with burst-fire capability.

weapons.name: Shotgun
weapons.description: Close-range weapon. Must direct all shots against a single target.

weapons.name: Hunting Rifle
weapons.description: Long-range rifle. Suffers -1 to hit when moving.

weapons.name: Marksman's Rifle
weapons.description: Precision long-range rifle.

weapons.name: Rattle Gun
weapons.description: High-rate-of-fire support weapon.

weapons.name: Flak Gun
weapons.description: Short-range weapon that fires fragmentation rounds.

weapons.name: Shell Gun
weapons.description: Fires explosive shells over long range.

weapons.name: Hand Laser
weapons.description: Compact energy sidearm.

weapons.name: Beam Pistol
weapons.description: Focused beam sidearm with armor-cracking potential.

weapons.name: Infantry Laser
weapons.description: Standard-issue energy rifle.

weapons.name: Blast Rifle
weapons.description: Mid-range energy weapon.

weapons.name: Hyper Blaster
weapons.description: High-output energy weapon with rapid fire.

weapons.name: Fury Rifle
weapons.description: Powerful energy rifle that ignores saving throws.

weapons.name: Plasma Rifle
weapons.description: Advanced weapon that fires superheated plasma. Ignores saving throws.

weapons.name: Needle Rifle
weapons.description: Fires microscopic needles that find weak points.

weapons.name: Cling Fire Pistol
weapons.description: Projects adhesive incendiary compounds.

weapons.name: Hand Flamer
weapons.description: Projects a cone of flame. Affects all figures within 2 inches.

weapons.name: Blade
weapons.description: Basic melee weapon. Grants +2 to Brawling rolls.

weapons.name: Ripper Sword
weapons.description: Serrated blade that inflicts vicious wounds.

weapons.name: Boarding Saber
weapons.description: Refined melee weapon favored by ship crews.

weapons.name: Shatter Axe
weapons.description: Heavy axe designed to breach armor.

weapons.name: Power Claw
weapons.description: Powered crushing weapon. Clumsy but devastating.

weapons.name: Glare Sword
weapons.description: Energy-edged blade that ignores saving throws.

weapons.name: Suppression Maul
weapons.description: Heavy impact weapon used for crowd control.

weapons.name: Frakk Grenade
weapons.description: Fragmentation grenade. Affects all figures within 2 inches.

weapons.name: Dazzle Grenade
weapons.description: Stun grenade that disorients targets within blast radius.

armor.name: Light Armor
armor.description: Basic protection that doesn't restrict movement.

armor.name: Combat Armor
armor.description: Standard military-grade armor with good all-around protection.

armor.name: Heavy Armor
armor.description: Heavy-duty armor that provides excellent protection at the cost of mobility.

armor.name: Powered Armor
armor.description: Advanced exoskeleton that enhances strength while providing superior protection.

armor.name: Stealth Suit
armor.description: Specialized suit that reduces visibility to sensors and the naked eye.

armor.name: Hazard Suit
armor.description: Specialized protection against environmental hazards and contamination.

gear.name: Medkit
gear.description: Standard medical kit for treating injuries in the field.

gear.name: Repair Kit
gear.effect: Repair damaged equipment or restore 1D6 health to bots
gear.description: Tools and parts for field repairs of equipment and mechanical units.

gear.name: Scanner
gear.effect: Detect hidden objects and lifeforms within 12 inches
gear.description: Handheld device that can detect various signatures through walls and obstacles.

gear.name: Grapple Gun
gear.effect: Move to any point within 18 inches that can support your weight
gear.description: Launches a grappling hook that allows rapid vertical and horizontal movement.

gear.name: Stim Pack
gear.effect: +1 to all stats for one turn, then -1 to all stats for one turn
gear.description: Combat stimulant that temporarily enhances performance followed by a crash.

gear.name: Cloaking Device
gear.effect: Become invisible to visual detection for 1D3 turns
gear.description: Personal stealth field generator that bends light around the user.

gear.name: Energy Shield
gear.effect: +2 protection against all attacks for 1D3 turns
gear.description: Portable energy barrier that provides temporary protection from attacks.

gear.name: Hacking Tool
gear.effect: Bypass electronic locks or control automated systems
gear.description: Advanced device for interfacing with and overriding electronic systems.

attachments.name: Weapon Scope
attachments.description: Optical enhancement that improves accuracy at long distances.

attachments.name: Silencer
attachments.description: Suppresses the sound of weapon discharge.

attachments.name: Extended Magazine
attachments.description: Increases ammunition capacity, allowing for more shots before reloading.

attachments.name: Targeting System
attachments.description: Advanced aiming assistance that improves accuracy at all ranges.

attachments.name: Bayonet
attachments.effect: Can be used as a melee weapon (damage 1)
attachments.description: Blade attachment that allows the weapon to be used in close combat.

attachments.name: Stabilizer
attachments.description: Reduces weapon recoil, improving control during sustained fire.
